title: N-Hydroxy-N,N'-Diphenylbenzamidine-A New Type of Analytical Reagent. Solvent Extraction and Spectrophotometric Determination of Vanadium(V)
author: K. SATYANARAYANA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, College of Science, Raipur (M.P.) 

 Department of Chemistry, Ravishankar University, Raipur (M.P.) 

  Manuscript received 27 January 1976; revised 31 May 1976; accepted 15 July 1976  

 A method is developed for the spectrophotometric determination of vanadium(V) using N-­hydroxy-N, N'-diphenylbenzamidine as a new type of reagent. The procedure is selective and most of the common ions including Fe 3+ , Mo 6+ , Mn 2+  and Cr 3+  do not interfere. Vanadium in BCS steels is determined precisely and accurately.
